stages.name: targeted_unit_tests
stages.evidence: performance_benchmark_test (cached/uncached, cold/warm, serial/parallel equivalence; machine-readable benchmark snapshot; diagnostics.cache snapshot + schema validity) passes; full suite green

stages.name: property_tests
stages.evidence: equivalentIgnoringTiming proves cached and uncached reports differ only in diagnostics.cache and durations, cold and warm runs are identical except durations, and serial and parallel reports differ only in durations; worker_pool paths give every concurrent mutant a distinct workspace, .zig-cache, and zig-out

stages.name: documentation_budget_check
stages.evidence: failed on the pre-052 doc (git show HEAD), passes with the four concrete numeric CI smoke budgets added to docs/PERFORMANCE_STRATEGY.md

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: full self-mutation dogfood of the cache/worker/report code is gated to the Phase 5 stages (task 085); the benchmark and equivalence contracts are deterministic and covered by unit and property-style tests

residual_risk: the report v1 diagnostics.cache field is populated through cache.toReportDiagnostics; the run command's product report is not changed here (run_command.zig is outside this task's allowed scope), so wiring it into the live run is a follow-up consumer step
